caption:
It actually personally upsets me when people don’t back themselves

I can just never understand it or process it

You’ve got business owners sat on real talent, real skill, real ability to change someone’s life and they just won’t pull the trigger

They’ll buy another course instead of backing the knowledge they’ve already got

They’ll scroll someone else’s page and convince themselves that person is levels above them when they’re not

They’ll stay in the same position for another six months telling themselves the timing isn’t right

And I watch it happen over and over again knowing exactly what they’re capable of

That’s the bit that gets me

It’s not that they can’t do it, it’s that they won’t let themselves

Back yourself

caption:
You can not even maintain volume for instagram posting and then complain about not growing, open your eyes

It is not the algorithm, it is not your niche, it is not the market

You are posting twice a week and wondering why nothing is moving, then blaming everything except the one thing you can actually control

Consistency is not a nice to have, it is the baseline

The people actually growing right now are posting every single day, personal brand content that builds trust before anyone even gets on a call

AI powered systems doing the drafting without eating up your week, consistent volume, consistent message, consistent results

It is not complicated, you are just not showing up enough

Follow for the content that actually builds something.
If that video is sat in your drafts and you think it’s a good idea, delete it

caption:
Top 10 Claude AI skills you need to know, from someone who has been using it for 12 months before it was cool.

Train it on your voice, build projects not just chats, co-work with it not just generate from it, run your sales calls through it, use it for content ideation at scale

Feed it your audience language, build lead magnets in minutes, write email sequences, build caption frameworks, refine your offer with real data

The skill is not in the prompting, it is in the training

The organisations that have properly adopted AI for content are producing around 35% more output in 40% less time, and that gap is widening every quarter between those using it and those not

Want the full breakdown, drop me a DM with the word CLAUDE.

Living inside of my head for the best part of 24 years was torture 

I still have days, even today, where it’s still the same 

I hated every single thing about the educational system 

I hated employment and hierarchy and the general system, I would say 

So a long time ago I decided to create my own 

I realised if I weren’t good at something, all I needed to do was break it down 

But in order for me to break it down, I had to be passionate about it 

So I stopped fucking about or doing anything that I wasn’t passionate about 

And then started doubling down on what I did actually care about and what interested me 

From that point it was just a case of breaking it down in a sequential process 

I’m a big believer in the compounding effect 

And I think that starts with your perspective on how you actually look at something first

caption: Please explain to me again how she twisted the bully up like a pretzel for my own amusement 😊

Business owners with 5,000 followers are out-selling those with 100,000, and I have done it myself

Reach does not build a business, the right reach does

I spent years chasing attention and wondering why nothing was converting, it was a positioning problem not a content problem

Five thousand people who trust you beats one hundred thousand who scroll past, by a country mile

Accounts with a clear consistent niche grow around 70% faster than those posting all over the place, the algorithm does not reward volume it rewards clarity

Stop speaking to everyone, start being unapologetically specific about who you are for

Worth a follow if this resonates, more of this every single day.

caption:
Stop trying to run before you can walk…

Chat → like speaking to an intelligent friend who thinks, responds, and helps you work through ideas in real time

Projects → like having an independent workspace where everything (context, files, goals) stays organised and builds over time

Co-work → like having an assistant who can actually do tasks for you, not just suggest them

Code in App → like having a built-in coding workspace where you can write, test, and iterate without leaving Claude

——

Yes there is more levels, but stop trying to go high level so fast

Code (Terminal) → like having a developer’s command line where things get executed, tested, and run

Code (Agent) → like having an autonomous engineer that can build, debug, and ship solutions with minimal input

———

Start chatting 
Start interacting 
Start communicating 

If you have a vision for it then absolutely anything is possible now for anyone out there in any business 

And if you ain’t got a clue on where to start with this, I can literally hand you these systems as a copy and paste SOP

caption:
Out of everything that I’ve achieved in life and business, that day is still my proudest moment 

Not because I was brave, because I wasn’t. And certainly not because I had some grand plan. But simply because I’d watched that person destroy everyone around me for years and nothing was done about it

A lot of the time leadership looks like being the only person who is willing to do the uncomfortable thing 

And it taught me something that I carry into every single day now 

If you want something to change, you have to be the one who changes it 

Not when it’s convenient. Not when everyone agrees. Not when it feels safe. 

A lot of people stay quiet because staying quiet is easier 

They will tolerate things that shouldn’t be tolerated because challenging them comes with a cost 

But the cost of saying silent is always higher, you just might not see that straight away 

If you’re in a position right now where something needs to be said and you’re holding back because you’re worried about how people will react 

Then that’s your sign to say it and do it, otherwise you’ll be carrying that baggage for years to come

caption:
I don’t really have the words for a video for this…

All I can say is that finishing this book and experiencing Chapter 10 - Finding Peace & Purpose and feeling the best fatherhood has to give… lit a fire of hunger, resilience and relentlessness that I don’t think I’ve experienced since the starting point of these chapters… 15 years ago.

Orders available with the link in my bio 📚

Here’s a taste of the book…

“As I’m writing this, I’m a multi-7 figure business owner, husband, father, team leader. I am happy, I have freedom and purpose, and that hasn’t been an easy road. So despite how open I am about my previous struggles throughout the book, I want you to know that the journey I’m about to take you on—through both the crushing lows and exhilarating highs, has led me to a place where life finally makes sense. Where the chaos has order. Where the daily battles have purpose. Where I am winning, when for a very long time, I didn’t know how long I’d be able to maintain participation.

This isn’t just another business book (even though there are 154 key actionable’s).

This isn’t just another self-help manifesto (despite there being 96 life lesson’s).

This is the raw, unfiltered story of how I discovered what I call “The 50/50 Rule”, the fundamental truth that success, fulfilment, and genuine impact come from mastering two distinct but equally crucial domains: your inner world and your outer systems.

50% human. 50% machine.

caption:
The most successful people I know are operationally efficient, it has fuck all to do with volume

I used to measure my worth by how busy I was, what I built off the back of it was exhaustion

What shifted everything was getting honest about what was actually moving the needle and cutting everything else

My personal brand qualifies before I ever speak to someone, AI handles the production and repetitive thinking, my energy goes to strategy and conviction

That combination is by a country mile the most powerful way to build right now

Less is more when the less you are doing is the right things

Personal brand posts get something like 560% more reach than company page content on LinkedIn, if you are investing more time in a company page than your personal profile you are genuinely fighting the platform

What is the one thing you are still doing manually that costs you the most time, drop it in the comments.

Swipe at the end to see what I really think about excuses 

If you are new to business, you are in the luckiest, most incredible generation I have ever experienced and will ever experience 

If you’ve been playing business for a long time like I have and you are not currently stacking every resource, time, and energy into this technology, you are mental 

But this is honestly what I love about it the most 

I can’t 
But 
This 
That 

There is literally no excuse for anyone in any business at any level 

You can fail, rebuild, and relaunch a hundred times faster than you’ve ever been able to do before 

You can ideate.
You can create.
You can automate.
You can connect.
You can evolve without even lifting a finger.

Book a call with a link in my bio 

Stop messing about. I’ve been banging on about this for God knows how long now

caption:
The Walk Out | 15th August 2026 - Men, Women & Children

In collaboration with @toms.talks__ & @walktalkmensclub 

We also have 30+ confirmed support partners (and growing) who you’ll see on the walk & talk page over the coming months.

Originally the plan was mission 100, which would mean £10,000 invested back into the community but we want to blow that figure out of the water.

I’m not asking for a single penny from you, just your support and attendance on the day if you can make it - or share into relevant groups.

I’ll be funding everything needed for the 15th, alongside the plan to host a mens retreat in the Lake District in 2027 with all expenses covered.

This event isn’t just to talk about it, it’s to stand up and fight against it.

To show every man who is silently struggling that he is not alone.

To remind fathers, sons, brothers, partners, and friends that their lives matter.

To create a space where strength is redefined - not as silence, but as support.

On the 15th of August 2026, we walk together.

Men. Women. Children. Families. Communities. United as one.

We are walking for the men who feel they have to “be strong” in silence.

We are walking for the men who never made it home.

We are walking for the men who are still here but hurting behind closed doors.

Facebook event will be in my bio from now until the 15th, if you want the direct link just DM ‘Walk Out’ and if you want to join as a supporting partner for the day - just let me know.

caption:
If you don’t think AI is for your business, give your head a wobble 

It’s been one of the biggest talking points I’ve had today so I’ve whipped this post together 

What is the difference between your business and mine or your business and someone else’s? 

I have been completely and utterly against the concept or trigger word of cheat code for my entire career 

I have stood behind the concept of doing it right for the last decade 

This is what I am doing right now for me, for my clients, and hopefully for you 

All businesses operate, market, and sell with fundamental first principles 

Those first principles can be managed, optimised, scaled, and done for you with artificial intelligence 

AI for me isn’t a gimmick. It’s legitimate common sense 

So if you think that AI is not for you and your business, swipe through these slides 

As you’ll see on the final slide if you can read, copy and paste, you can build any of these systems

You know where we’re at

caption:
You won’t love this all of the time, stop thinking you should be 😂

There’s a big difference between fun, enjoyment, and passion 

If you’re passionate about something then you can push through the pain that it puts on you 

If you think that this is going to be fun and enjoyable every single day, you’re in for a reality check 

There are extensive, long periods of time where you will go through nothing other than self-doubt 

You will fear the repercussions of things that potentially might not work 

You will go through an identity crisis the higher that you go through these levels 

Which is why I’ll come back to the point at the start around passion 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your offers 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your niche 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy creating content 

A lot of you don’t even know why you are even doing this 

No wonder you’re fucking burnt out, falling out with it and constantly hot and cold 

Don’t get lost with all this high-tech AI stuff and nail the basics of what you need to scale a business 

FYI we can’t help you with both above

Comment “PROJECTS” to have your mind literally blown ☺️

If you’re a solo-preneur you’re bottlenecking yourself and you’re not doing enough.

If you have a team, you’re not giving them enough time, resources, and systems to follow.

You could put one hundred businesses in front of me and I would be able to point out where all of them are bottle-necking themselves because they ain’t got enough time to do something properly

If you’re only using ChatGPT and you think AI is shit, I dare you to read that guide because you need to open your eyes 

If you’re currently using Claude, this will legitimately blow your mind at how little you are actually using it

We will have the first ever solo billionaire in 2026 with a project set up like this and AI agents integrated 

And the funny thing is this is just projects… code takes it to a different league all together.

caption:
This post will create two divides

✅ People that like me
❌ People that don’t

And that’s completely fine. That’s actually the point and it’s something you need to focus on 

If you disagree with what I hate, that’s absolutely fine. I wouldn’t want to work with you anyway 

If you agree with what I hate, that’s even better. I think we’ll probably get along 

If you’re not sure if you’re aligned to it or not, then that’s a problem for you because you’re sat on the fence of despair 

This is a prime example of the kind of thing that you need to be focused on with social media in this AI era 

People will not be buying into information anymore 

If you saw what I have done in the last few days alone, you will see that it is not valuable 

You are the USP

Arrowhead, your true personal brand, harder than you’ve ever done it before 

Adopt aggressively into artificial intelligence so you don’t get left behind 

The best time to start all this was twelve months ago 

The next best time is right now
